message:
Update episodic-memory to v1.0.5

- Fix sqlite-vec optional dependency installation
- Remove BETA/UNTESTED label - plugin is now stable
- Update description to emphasize memory restoration

files.patch:
@@ -48,8 +48,8 @@
         "source": "url",
         "url": "https://github.com/obra/episodic-memory.git"
       },
-      "description": "BETA: UNTESTED - Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns across sessions.",
-      "version": "1.0.0",
+      "description": "Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns across sessions. Gives you memory that persists between sessions.",
+      "version": "1.0.5",
       "keywords": ["memory", "search", "conversations", "semantic-search", "episodic", "history", "context"],
       "strict": true
     },
